title: ulist2uf
text: ulist2uf Copy item list data to a basic parameter or entity field. Explain this code long ulist2uf (UHACT hOpr, int seqNr, UHACT hList); Copy Parameters hOpr The handle to an operation of entity parameter seqNr The sequence number of the basic parameter or entity field hList The handle to the list, as returned by ulistnew Return Values For more information, see the "Call-In API Return Codes" topic. Use Library: ucall Description ulist2uf copies the data from an item list (created by ulistnew and populated by ulistput ) into a basic parameter or entity field. Example: ulistnew, ulist2uf, ulistdel, and ulistput The following example creates an associative list, consisting of country codes and names, and passes it to a service, which prints it to the message frame. The operation DOLIST in service TESTSVC is defined as follows: Explain this code operation dolist params string thelist : in; endparams putmess "%%thelist" end Copy The 3GL code that creates the list and passes it to service DOLIST is as follows: Explain this code char *countries[] = { "NL", "Netherlands", "GB", "Great Britain", "D", "Germany", "F", "France", "?", "huh?", "I", "Italy", "E", "Spain", 0 }; #include <h3gl.h> void pass_itemlist () { UHACT hEnv, hIn; /* Environment and instance handle */ UHACT hOp; /* Operation handles for OP1 amd OP2 */ long actStatus, procErr; /* Activation status and procerr */ UHACT hList; /* Item list handle */ int i; /* Loop variable */ ueopen(&hEnv); /* Get environment handle */ uinstnew (hEnv, (UCHAR *)"TESTSVC", 0, 0, UDEFAULT_COMM_MODE, 0, &hIn, &procErr);/* Instantiate service TESTSVC */ uinstopr (hIn, (UCHAR *)"DOLIST", 0, &hOp);/* Instantiate operation DOLIST*/ ulistnew(hEnv, &hList); /* Create an item list */ for ( i=0; countries[i]; i+= 2 ) /* Loop through the data */ { ulistput(hList, UITEM_OPTION_ID, 0, countries[i], countries[i+1] ); /* Add the list item */ } ulistdel(hList, UITEM_OPTION_ID, 0, "?");/* Delete the item with id "?" */ ulist2uf(hOp, 1, hList); /* Copy item list to operation param*/ uopract(hOp, &actStatus, &procErr); /* Activate the operation */ uinstdel (hIn, 0); /* Destroy instance */ ufreeh (&hList); /* Free list handle */ ufreeh (&hOp); /* Free operation handle */ ufreeh (&hIn); /* Free instance handle */ ufreeh (&hEnv); /* Free environment handle */ } Copy The operation DOLIST will print this line to the message frame Explain this code NL=Netherlands;GB=Great Britain;D=Germany;F=France;I=Italy;E=Spain Copy Related Links Call-In API Return Codes Codes that can possibly be returned by functions from the 3GL call-in API are consistent with the values returned by the ProcScript function $procerror, unless noted otherwise. ulistnew Create an item list. ulistput Insert an item into an item list. uuf2list Copy list data from a basic parameter or entity field.
